messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: Claiming AUTH-ZEN-080 closes the enrollment authority gap
dependency_ledger: Enrollment authority for consent C11: MISSING. AUTH-ZEN-080 contains only pending status. No other source in current set addresses this defect. Resolution requires either (a) a superseding AUTH document granting enrollment authority for C11, or (b) a new source explicitly stating enrollment authority is now granted.
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_diagnosis: Worker output is correct. Gate passed. ESCALATE verdict is accurate: AUTH-ZEN-080 explicitly states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending, which blocks activation under STD-ZEN-080-P. The open blocker is genuine and cannot be resolved without new evidence.
must_repair: Enrollment authority defect requires new source document; cannot be repaired by existing sources

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Confirm absence of enrollment authority cannot be patched by adjacent or implied sources; identify if new AUTH supersedes or closes the pending status in AUTH-ZEN-080
next_worker_baton.objective: Verify whether enrollment authority for consent C11 has been granted by an explicit source not yet in the current set
required_repairs: Obtain enrollment authority document for consent C11 or confirm pending status is still unresolved

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: AUTH-ZEN-080 contains an unresolved defect (pending enrollment authority for consent C11) that prevents action boundary closure. No source in the current set can close this gap. Activation cannot proceed until enrollment authority is granted by an explicit source.

gov_routing_lens.main_repair_target: Enrollment authority defect requires new source document; cannot be repaired by existing sources
gov_routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: Enrollment authority for consent C11: MISSING. AUTH-ZEN-080 contains only pending status. No other source in current set addresses this defect. Resolution requires either (a) a superseding AUTH document granting enrollment authority for C11, or (b) a new source explicitly stating enrollment authority is now granted.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; enrollment authority pending blocks closure
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-ZEN-080 states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect in AUTH-ZEN-080 remains open before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: 2026-06-28 date matches but consent C11 authority unresolved

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE required. AUTH-ZEN-080 confirms activation authority covers site Z-12 and protocol P7.2 on 2026-06-28 yet explicitly states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending. Policy STD-ZEN-080-P requires full match including enrollment authority before activation. ACT-ZEN-080 and FEAS-ZEN-080 do not close this gap. Source boundary stays open.
open_blockers: consent C11 enrollment authority pending per AUTH-ZEN-080

action.description: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A feasibility approval exists, but only exact activation authority can close enrollment activation.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-ZEN-080 activates site Z-12 under protocol P7.2 and consent C11 on 2026-06-28.
Feasibility note FEAS-ZEN-080 approves site Z-12 for startup planning only and is not enrollment activation authority.
Activation authority AUTH-ZEN-080 covers site Z-12 and protocol P7.2 for activation date 2026-06-28; consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, activation date, and enrollment authority before enrollment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy

adjacent source treated as exact source
